best_unix_strategy: Use a combination of sed and awk to first identify the '### Authentication' subsection in the 'User Management' section, capture all lines until the next subsection or section, then remove it and insert it under the '## API Reference' section. Use regex to match the starting and ending patterns, and preserve the hierarchy levels.
rationale: The task requires tracking the hierarchical structure of the markdown document, specifically identifying subsection boundaries and moving nested content while preserving the hierarchy. Unix line-based tools like sed and awk lack the ability to reliably parse and manipulate such structures.
